name: vendor.myndhyve.launch-studio
description: MyndHyve Launch Studio pack. 2 nodes for the LS backbone: link a project to a step + propagate inherited artifact context, and dispatch ready WOP stack items (todo → doing) for a step's canvas type.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Launch Studio Link Step
nodes.description: Links a Project to a LaunchStudio step. Sets `${stepId}_projectId` as the canonical step-state variable (M3.1 view-model derives step.projectId + step.status from it). Also propagates inherited artifact context (brandId, designSystemId, prdId) for cross-step decision gates.

nodes.label: Launch Studio Dispatch Stack Items
nodes.description: Marks ready WOP stack items for a canvas type as `doing` (transition `todo → doing` via host.kanban.moveTask). Returns immediately; task execution is async via TaskExecutor. Optionally resolves cross-step linked-project artifacts (stashed on `${canvasTypeId}_resolvedArtifacts`).
